title: FACILITIES / BUILDING MANAGER
description:
FACILITIES / BUILDING MANAGER

We are looking for an experienced hands-on manager to oversee the daily operations of several industrial/commercial & residential properties. You will be coordinating and managing maintenance and repair activities, and liaising with vendors to ensure smooth daily operations.


To be successful as our Facilities/Building Manager, you should have excellent organizational and project management skills and ensure that our properties are in compliance with applicable regulations and building codes. A top-notch Facilities/Building Manager should be able to respond to and resolve any issues reported by tenants efficiently.


Roles & Responsibilities

• Coordinating and overseeing regular building maintenance and repairs.

• Managing and directing maintenance/cleaning staff and activities.

• Preparing and carrying out emergency protocols and procedures.

• Maintaining a safe environment for building occupants and visitors.

• Preparing and monitoring maintenance budgets.

• Negotiating and liaising with third party service providers.

• Conducting regular building inspections and preparing reports.

• Ensuring facilities are in compliance with applicable policies, regulations and building codes.

• Responding to enquiries and requests by building tenants and resolving any problems or issues.


Requirements

• Diploma in Building Estate Management.

• Minimum 5 years’ experience as a Facilities/Building Manager or in a similar role.

• Knowledge of relevant laws, regulations and building codes.

• Excellent project management and negotiation skills.

• Excellent command of MS Excel and Word.

• Good oral and written communication and customer service skills.

• Strong critical thinking and problem solving skills.

• Physically fit with own transport.

• Must be able to be mobilized after office hours in case of emergency.


Benefits

• Basic monthly gross salary SGD 4,500 – 5,500.

• 5 day week after 3 month probation.

• Annual and Medical Leave encashment.

• Performance bonus.

• Revenue sharing scheme.


Please email your resume to hr@SingaporeG.sg and let us have the following information in addition to your resume:

1. Current salary.

2. Expected salary.

3. Reasons for leaving past / present employers.

4. Notice period required.

postedCompany.description:
Singapore G Pte Ltd was founded in 1973. Our motto is to responsibly provide our customers with value added services at a fair price.

Besides offering grade A warehouse and office space, the company is continuously looking at ways to provide complementary services to our customers. We provide self-storage facilities under U-Store@SG where customers may rent storage space from as little as 10 sq. ft. on a monthly basis.

Serviced offices, meeting rooms, briefing and board rooms are also available for short term lease and hourly hire under MustardSeed@SG. Providing maximum flexibility to every business need. TreeTops Sports Gym allows an avenue for one to keep physically and mentally fit.

Singapore G provides for all kinds of business space requirements under one roof.

Singapore G not only invest in brick and mortar facilities, but also develop our human resources. Staffs are briefed on current regulatory developments, trained in first aid; and are required to maintain a standard of fitness and vigilance to better serve our tenants.
postedCompany.name: SINGAPORE G PTE. LTD.
